generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we relied on foreign allies for our defense? Look what happened last year when supply chains collapsed. Our elderly veterans were left stranded without critical medications because we didn't have domestic production capacity. This isn't just about jobs - it's about national security. We can't afford to be dependent on unstable foreign partners for our most basic needs. Strategic autonomy isn't just smart policy, it's survival. #NationalSecurity #MadeInAmerica
